name: tokenplan-usage-hud
description: Provider-agnostic Claude Code statusline plugin for token-plan usage and account balance. Picks the provider from ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL (currently MiniMax + DeepSeek); hides itself otherwise. Renders a dim ' · Xm ago' annotation when displaying cached data after a fetch failure, or 'Usage:/Balance: not available!' when no cached data exists. Composes with another statusline via the TOKENPLAN_UPSTREAM_CMD env var.
